ideation: This sequence depicts dizziness by having the robot's arms flail around somewhat erratically, with a slight swaying of the body to enhance the effect.  The arms will move independently, not in sync, to simulate disorientation.  The final frame will show the robot's arms returning to a resting position, suggesting the dizziness is subsiding.  I will use a combination of joint rotations and wrist movements to produce the necessary level of chaos while avoiding extreme angles that might look unrealistic. The sequence will be 5 frames long.

frames.beat: arms flail outwards, a dizzying start
arms cross and spin, losing balance
a wild, disoriented spin in opposite directions
arms drop, the spinning finally stops
